meaning: n.<英>(4条或4条以上道路的)交叉路口
examples: Centred on Carfax, the Oxford city centre is relatively small.
Carfax Tower is situated in the city centre, and is the landmark of Oxford.
With scarcely another word I saw her to the convent, then took the bus back to Carfax.
You can use the vehicle identification number to get a report from a variety of online services, including AutoCheck and Carfax.
